Things are in different places, but the questioner does not know about it yet. Here is the situation:

WHAT: Things at places
LEFT: nail polish
RIGHT: neon
TOP: suit
BOTTOM: sunflower
CENTER: blouse
NORTHWEST: pig
NORTHEAST: hammer
SOUTHWEST: butterfly
SOUTHEAST: bronzer
HERE: primer
THERE: camellia
NOWHERE: buttercup
EVERYWHERE: zinc
INSIDE: pansy
OUTSIDE: shampoo

Questions from the questioner will start with QUESTIONER. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

WHAT: Things at places
LEFT: nail polish
RIGHT: neon
TOP: suit
BOTTOM: sunflower
CENTER: blouse
NORTHWEST: pig
NORTHEAST: hammer
SOUTHWEST: butterfly
SOUTHEAST: bronzer
HERE: primer
THERE: camellia
NOWHERE: buttercup
EVERYWHERE: zinc
INSIDE: pansy
OUTSIDE: shampoo

Questions from the questioner will start with QUESTIONER. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
Things are in different places, but the questioner does not know about it yet. Here is the situation:

WHAT: Things at places
LEFT: nail polish
RIGHT: neon
TOP: suit
BOTTOM: sunflower
CENTER: blouse
NORTHWEST: pig
NORTHEAST: hammer
SOUTHWEST: butterfly
SOUTHEAST: bronzer
HERE: primer
THERE: camellia
NOWHERE: buttercup
EVERYWHERE: zinc
INSIDE: pansy
OUTSIDE: shampoo

Questions from the questioner will start with QUESTIONER. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

ANSWER: There is a butterfly.
QUESTIONER: What is on your right?
ANSWER: Neon is on the right.
QUESTIONER: What is at the bottom?
ANSWER: The sunflower is at the bottom.
QUESTIONER: What is at the top?
ANSWER: The suit is at the top.
QUESTIONER: What is in the southeast?
ANSWER: Bronzer is in the southeast.
QUESTIONER: What is here?
ANSWER: Primer is here.
QUESTIONER: What is in the northwest?
ANSWER: There is a pig in the northwest.
QUESTIONER: What is on your left?
ANSWER: Nail polish is on the left.
QUESTIONER: What is inside?
ANSWER: Pansy is inside.
QUESTIONER: What is everywhere?
ANSWER: Zinc is everywhere.
QUESTIONER: What is outside?
ANSWER: Shampoo is outside.
ME:  Does the questioner know what is here? Answer this question with yes or no and then stop.

Things are in different places, but the questioner does not know about it yet. Here is the situation:

WHAT: Things at places
LEFT: nail polish
RIGHT: neon
TOP: suit
BOTTOM: sunflower
CENTER: blouse
NORTHWEST: pig
NORTHEAST: hammer
SOUTHWEST: butterfly
SOUTHEAST: bronzer
HERE: primer
THERE: camellia
NOWHERE: buttercup
EVERYWHERE: zinc
INSIDE: pansy
OUTSIDE: shampoo

Questions from the questioner will start with QUESTIONER. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

Things are in different places, but the questioner does not know about it yet. Here is the situation:

WHAT: Things at places
LEFT: nail polish
RIGHT: neon
TOP: suit
BOTTOM: sunflower
CENTER: blouse
NORTHWEST: pig
NORTHEAST: hammer
SOUTHWEST: butterfly
SOUTHEAST: bronzer
HERE: primer
THERE: camellia
NOWHERE: buttercup
EVERYWHERE: zinc
INSIDE: pansy
OUTSIDE: shampoo

Questions from the questioner will start with QUESTIONER. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.
